card.name: Sundial of the Infinite
card.text: {1}, {T}: End the turn. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: The Gloink Queen
card.text: {1}{G}: Create a 1/1 green Insect creature token.

card.name: Caine, Digital Ringmaster
card.text: Flying Make Adventures — Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, exile any number of other target nontoken creatures with total mana value X or less, where X is that spell's mana value. Return those creatures to the battlefield under their owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Cast Down
card.text: Destroy target nonlegendary creature.

card.name: Censor
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}. Cycling {U}

card.name: Endless Detour
card.text: The owner of target spell, nonland permanent, or card in a graveyard puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Pest Infestation
card.text: Destroy up to X target artifacts and/or enchantments. Create twice X 1/1 black and green Pest creature tokens with "When this token dies, you gain 1 life."

card.name: Reality Shift
card.text: Exile target creature. Its controller manifests the top card of their library.

card.name: Untimely Malfunction
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Change the target of target spell or ability with a single target. • One or two target creatures can't block this turn.

card.name: Apocalypse Runner
card.text: {T}: Target creature you control with power 2 or less gains lifelink until end of turn and can't be blocked this turn. Crew 3

card.name: Impostor Syndrome
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary.

card.name: Plow Through
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. • Destroy target Vehicle.

card.name: The Fudge // Have for Dinner
card.text:
Menace, trample At the beginning of your upkeep, you may sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, or token. If you don't, tap this creature.
---
Create a 1/1 white Human creature token and a Food token. (Then exile this card. You may cast the creature later from exile.)

card.name: Rescue
card.text: Return target permanent you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: Snap
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Untap up to two lands.

card.name: Mind Funeral
card.text: Target opponent reveals cards from the top of their library until four land cards are revealed. That player puts all cards revealed this way into their graveyard.

card.name: Bind
card.text: Counter target activated ability. Draw a card.

card.name: Coercive Portal
card.text: Will of the council — At the beginning of your upkeep, starting with you, each player votes for carnage or homage. If carnage gets more votes, sacrifice this artifact and destroy all nonland permanents. If homage gets more votes or the vote is tied, draw a card.

card.name: Ghost Vacuum
card.text: {T}: Exile target card from a graveyard. {6}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put each creature card exiled with this artifact onto the battlefield under your control with a flying counter on it. Each of them is a 1/1 Spirit in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Shriek of Dread
card.text: Target creature gains fear until end of turn.

card.name: Sinister Possession
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature attacks or blocks, its controller loses 2 life.

card.name: Stubborn Denial
card.text: Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {1}. Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, counter that spell instead.

card.name: Ad Nauseam
card.text: Reveal the top card of your library and put that card into your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value. You may repeat this process any number of times.

card.name: Exhaustion
card.text: Creatures and lands target opponent controls don't untap during their next untap step.

card.name: Honest Work
card.text: Enchant creature an opponent controls When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature and remove all counters from it. Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a Citizen with base power and toughness 1/1 and "{T}: Add {C}" named Humble Merchant. (It loses all other creature types and names.)

card.name: Propaganda
card.text: Creatures can't attack you unless their controller pays {2} for each creature they control that's attacking you.

card.name: Stupefying Touch
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, draw a card. Enchanted creature's activated abilities can't be activated.

card.name: Drown in Ichor
card.text: Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn. Proliferate.

card.name: Feed the Swarm
card.text: Destroy target creature or enchantment an opponent controls. You lose life equal to that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Cathartic Reunion
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard two cards. Draw three cards.

card.name: Imposing Visage
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has menace.

card.name: Suggestion Box
card.text: Imprint — When this artifact enters, each player exiles the top three cards of their library. Whenever a player casts a spell from their hand, that player exiles it. If the player does, they may cast a spell from among other cards exiled with this artifact without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Pacifism
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block.

card.name: Silence
card.text: Your opponents can't cast spells this turn.

card.name: Omniscience
card.text: You may cast spells from your hand without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Split Decision
card.text: Will of the council — Choose target instant or sorcery spell. Starting with you, each player votes for denial or duplication. If denial gets more votes, counter the spell. If duplication gets more votes or the vote is tied, copy the spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Sudden Substitution
card.text: Split second Exchange control of target noncreature spell and target creature. Then the spell's controller may choose new targets for it.

card.name: Time Stop
card.text: End the turn.

card.name: Chaos Warp
card.text: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
card.text: Delayed Blast Fireball deals 2 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. If this spell was cast from exile, it deals 5 damage to each opponent and each creature they control instead. Foretell {4}{R}{R}

card.name: Bite Down
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Indicate
card.text: Target permanent.

card.name: Artful Dodge
card.text: Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Flashback {U}

card.name: Frantic Search
card.text: Draw two cards, then discard two cards. Untap up to three lands.

card.name: Harmonized Crescendo
card.text: Convoke Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type.

card.name: Mental Note
card.text: Mill two cards. Draw a card.

card.name: Bedlam
card.text: Creatures can't block.

card.name: Boltbender
card.text: Disguise {1}{R} When this creature is turned face up, you may choose new targets for any number of other spells and/or abilities.

card.name: Disrupt Decorum
card.text: Goad all creatures you don't control.

card.name: Extra Arms
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature attacks, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Wild Ricochet
card.text: You may choose new targets for target instant or sorcery spell. Then copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Hide in Plain Sight
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library, cloak two of them, and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Refresh
card.text: Regenerate target creature. Draw a card.

card.name: Tandem Takedown
card.text: Up to two target creatures you control each get +1/+0 until end of turn. They each deal damage equal to their power to another target creature, planeswalker, or battle.

card.name: Kami of False Hope
card.text: Sacrifice this creature: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Reality Acid
card.text: Enchant permanent Vanishing 3 (This permanent enters with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.) When this Aura leaves the battlefield, enchanted permanent's controller sacrifices it.

card.name: Treasure Cruise
card.text: Delve Draw three cards.

card.name: Go for the Throat
card.text: Destroy target nonartifact creature.

card.name: Deflecting Swat
card.text: If you control a commander, you may cast this spell without paying its mana cost. You may choose new targets for target spell or ability.

card.name: Glorious End
card.text: End the turn. At the beginning of your next end step, you lose the game.

card.name: Panic
card.text: Cast this spell only during combat before blockers are declared. Target creature can't block this turn. Draw a card at the beginning of the next turn's upkeep.

card.name: Crucible of Worlds
card.text: You may play lands from your graveyard.

card.name: Door of Destinies
card.text: As this artifact enters, choose a creature type. Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, put a charge counter on this artifact. Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1 for each charge counter on this artifact.

card.name: Anointed Procession
card.text: If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.

card.name: Brace for Impact
card.text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to target multicolored creature this turn. For each 1 damage prevented this way, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Grand Crescendo
card.text: Create X 1/1 green and white Citizen creature tokens. Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Judge Unworthy
card.text: Choose target attacking or blocking creature. Scry 3, then reveal the top card of your library. Judge Unworthy deals damage equal to that card's mana value to that creature.

card.name: Late to Dinner
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Create a Food token.

card.name: Mirror Mockery
card.text: Enchant creature Whenever enchanted creature attacks, you may create a token that's a copy of that creature. Exile that token at end of combat.

card.name: Flay Essence
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker. You gain life equal to the number of counters on it.

card.name: Saw in Half
card.text: Destroy target creature. If that creature dies this way, its controller creates two tokens that are copies of that creature, except their power is half that creature's power and their toughness is half that creature's toughness. Round up each time.

card.name: Crackle with Power
card.text: Crackle with Power deals five times X damage to each of up to X targets.

card.name: Impending Disaster
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if there are seven or more lands on the battlefield, sacrifice this enchantment and destroy all lands.

card.name: Seize the Spotlight
card.text: Each opponent chooses fame or fortune. For each player who chose fame, gain control of a creature that player controls until end of turn. Untap those creatures and they gain haste until end of turn. For each player who chose fortune, you draw a card and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Turn to Slag
card.text: Turn to Slag deals 5 damage to target creature. Destroy all Equipment attached to that creature.

card.name: Anguished Unmaking
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. You lose 3 life.

card.name: Creative Outburst
card.text: Creative Outburst deals 5 damage to any target. Look at the top five cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. {UR}{UR}, Discard this card: Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Caine, Running the Show
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your end step, draw a card. Then each opponent faces a villainous choice — That player discards a card, or you and that player each mill a card. You may cast either card without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Caine, Tormented God
card.text: Menace, reach Whenever another non-Abstraction creature dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control face down and tapped. It's a 2/2 Abstraction creature. At the beginning of your end step, Caine deals X damage to another target creature, where X is the number of Abstractions in play.

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Beloved Princess
card.text: Lifelink This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.

card.name: Glimmervoid
card.text: At the beginning of the end step, if you control no artifacts, sacrifice this land. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Cathartic Parting
card.text: The owner of target artifact or enchantment an opponent controls shuffles it into their library. You may shuffle up to four target cards from your graveyard into your library.

card.name: Light from Within
card.text: Chroma — Each creature you control gets +1/+1 for each white mana symbol in its mana cost.

card.name: Zooble, the Friend
card.text: Whenever Zooble enters or attacks, you may look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal an Equipment card from among them and put it onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Kinger, the Fractured Mind
card.text: Defender, vigilance

card.name: Ragatha, the Optimist
card.text: Damage dealt to other creatures you control is dealt to Ragatha instead.

card.name: Jax, the Self-Loathing
card.text: Whenever a player casts a spell, you may pay 3 life. If you do, Jax deals damage equal to that spell's mana value to that player.

card.name: Pomni, the Newcomer
card.text: "Exit" — {2}: Exile Pomni. Return her to the battlefield under her owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Gangle, the Tragedy
card.text: Whenever an artifact you control dies, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Jax, the Troublemaker
card.text: First strike Screw Things Up — Jax can't block. Whenever Jax deals combat damage to a player, you and that player both discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: Zooble, the Grouch
card.text: Nope — The first time a spell or ability targets Zooble each turn, you may pay 2 life. If you do, Zooble phases out.

card.name: Solve the Equation
card.text: Search your library for an instant or sorcery card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
card.text: Delayed Blast Fireball deals 2 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. If this spell was cast from exile, it deals 5 damage to each opponent and each creature they control instead. Foretell {4}{R}{R}

card.name: Monstrous Rage
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Create a Monster Role token attached to it.

card.name: Inspiring Statuary
card.text: Nonartifact spells you cast have improvise.

card.name: Farewell
card.text: Choose one or more — • Exile all artifacts. • Exile all creatures. • Exile all enchantments. • Exile all graveyards.

card.name: Epic Downfall
card.text: Exile target creature with mana value 3 or greater.

card.name: Caine, Tormented God
card.text: Menace, reach Whenever another non-Abstraction creature dies, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control face down and tapped. It's a 2/2 Abstraction creature. At the beginning of your end step, Caine deals X damage to another target creature, where X is the number of Abstractions in play.

card.name: Trickster's Talisman
card.text: Invoke Duplicity — Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice Trickster's Talisman. If you do, create a token that's a copy of this creature." Equip {2}

card.name: Stunning Reversal
card.text: The next time you would lose the game this turn, instead draw seven cards and your life total becomes 1. Exile Stunning Reversal.

card.name: Keys to the House
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Lock or unlock a door of target Room you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Doomsday
card.text: Search your library and graveyard for five cards and exile the rest. Put the chosen cards on top of your library in any order. You lose half your life, rounded up.

card.name: Thespian's Stage
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}: This land becomes a copy of target land, except it has this ability.

card.name: Brittle Effigy
card.text: {1}, {T}, Exile this artifact: Exile target creature.

card.name: Seize the Spotlight
card.text: Each opponent chooses fame or fortune. For each player who chose fame, gain control of a creature that player controls until end of turn. Untap those creatures and they gain haste until end of turn. For each player who chose fortune, you draw a card and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Touch of Darkness
card.text: One or more target creatures become black until end of turn.

card.name: Bite Down
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Caine, Maker of Adventures
card.text: Flying Each creature card in your hand has a {U} Adventure instant named Digital Brainstorm with "Scry 2." (You may cast it as the Adventure for {U}. Then exile it, and you may cast the creature later from exile.) Whenever you cast a card from exile, you may open an Attraction.

card.name: Disappearing Guy
card.text: When a player casts a spell or a creature attacks, exile Disappearing Guy. Return him to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Disappearing Guy
card.text: When a player casts a spell or a creature attacks, exile Disappearing Guy. Return him to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Fabled Passage
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.

card.name: Door to Nothingness
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {W}{W}{U}{U}{B}{B}{R}{R}{G}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player loses the game.

card.name: Censor
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}. Cycling {U}

card.name: Glimmervoid
card.text: At the beginning of the end step, if you control no artifacts, sacrifice this land. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Go for the Throat
card.text: Destroy target nonartifact creature.

card.name: Bind
card.text: Counter target activated ability. Draw a card.

card.name: Chaos Warp
card.text: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library, then reveals the top card of their library. If it's a permanent card, they put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Harmonized Crescendo
card.text: Convoke Choose a creature type. Draw a card for each permanent you control of that type.
